ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the sales order was created */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being sold */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the material */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material ordered */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales person who created the order */,
  "consumption" INTEGER /* Amount of material consumed */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the sales order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the sales order was delivered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "total_order_value" TEXT /* Total value of the sales order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES sales_persons ("sales_person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_category" TEXT /* Category of the material */,
  "material_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the material */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_persons" (
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales person */,
  "sales_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales person */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the sales person */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department of the sales person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the material */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory movement */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of inventory movement */,
  "movement_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of inventory movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance entry */,
  "sales_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales order */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the material */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material ordered */,
  "consumption" INTEGER /* Amount of material consumed */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of sales performance */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the sales order */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit generated by the sales order */,
  "sales_growth" TEXT /* Sales growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_order_id") REFERENCES sales_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory entry */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory movement */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of inventory movement */,
  "movement_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of inventory movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id")
)
